# nat-kbd



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Overview

Keyboard shortcut display badge.
Renders individual key names with Mac or Windows symbols.

## Properties

| Property   | Attribute   | Description                                            | Type                   | Default     |
| ---------- | ----------- | ------------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------- | ----------- |
| `keyLabel` | `key-label` | Key label to display (alternative to slot)             | `string`               | `undefined` |
| `mac`      | `mac`       | If true, renders Mac symbols (⌘ ⌥ ⇧ ⌃) instead of text | `boolean`              | `false`     |
| `size`     | `size`      | Size variant                                           | `"lg" \| "md" \| "sm"` | `'md'`      |


## Slots

| Slot | Description    |
| ---- | -------------- |
|      | Key label text |
